title: crepis lacera
intro: Crepis lacera, also known as rough hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Crepis lacera include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as potentially lowering cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Crepis lacera can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
